items.title: February was the biggest month in venture history, thanks only to OpenAI, Anthropic, and Waymo
items.description: Startup funding surged to a historic $189 billion in February, driven almost entirely by three AI mega-rounds that captured 83% of the total.

items.title: Silicon Valley investor Vinod Khosla predicts education will be free, and the future of college ‘is a real question’
items.description: The billionaire VC says AI raises questions about how we value expertise.

items.title: A Minneapolis Fed report details how much Trump’s immigration crackdown hurt businesses and workers. ‘There are not any people to hire’
items.description: "We are hiring now to replace these workers or get more reliable alternatives, but there are not any people to hire."
